section_name: Suspension of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration or Privilege
text:
(a) Subject to Section 601.153 (Deposit of Security; Evidence of Financial Responsibility) , the department shall suspend the driver’s license and vehicle registrations of the owner and operator of a motor vehicle if:

(1) the vehicle is involved in any manner in a collision; and

(2) the department finds that there is a reasonable probability that a judgment will be rendered against the person as a result of the collision.

(b) If the owner or operator is a nonresident, the department shall suspend the person’s nonresident operating privilege and the privilege of use of any motor vehicle owned by the nonresident.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.152 — Suspension of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration or Privilege

(a) Subject to Section 601.153 (Deposit of Security; Evidence of Financial Responsibility) , the department shall suspend the driver’s license and vehicle registrations of the owner and operator of a motor vehicle if:

    (1) the vehicle is involved in any manner in a collision; and

    (2) the department finds that there is a reasonable probability that a judgment will be rendered against the person as a result of the collision.

(b) If the owner or operator is a nonresident, the department shall suspend the person’s nonresident operating privilege and the privilege of use of any motor vehicle owned by the nonresident.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 74, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.label: a

the vehicle is involved in any manner in a collision; and
the department finds that there is a reasonable probability that a judgment will be rendered against the person as a result of the collision.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If the owner or operator is a nonresident, the department shall suspend the person’s nonresident operating privilege and the privilege of use of any motor vehicle owned by the nonresident.
